dct_title_s:
Nieuwe Naaukeurige Land-en Zee-Kaart, van het voornaamſte Gedeelte der
          Kaffersche Kust, Begrypende de Sardanje-Bay en de Caap de Bonne Esperanc met alle des
          zelfs plantazien
dct_alternative_sm:
New and accurate map and sea chart of the Cape coast from Saldanha Bay to the Cape of
          Good Hope
dct_description_sm:
Title across top: Nova et Accurata Tabula Promontorii Bonae Spei vulgo Cabo de Bona
        Esperanca; Prime meridian through Tenerife. Joaquim "Ottens ... is associated with this map
        because it is listed in an atlas compiled by him, though it was not drawn up or published by
        him personally."
dct_spatial_sm: Good Hope, Cape of (South Africa : Cape)
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
